summary: Iteration 9: Comprehensive testing of 7 new features - all passed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (admin logins, schedule slots, training comments). Frontend: All UI features verified (horizontal date strip, no Sundays, gold selection, Marija Trisic only, Iskoristen badge, comment feature).

minor.issue: Stefan's PIN was not set because user already existed without pin_hash. Fixed by manually updating database.

critical_code_review_comments: seed_studio_users() should update pin_hash for existing users, not just new ones - minor fix applied to database
Horizontal date strip implementation is clean with proper Sunday skipping logic
Admin schedule correctly restricts instructor to only Marija Trisic
Past training comment feature works with proper UI/UX
seed_data_creation: Created test past training for Linea Trebinje to verify comment feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features verified: 1) Only Marija Trisic as instructor, 2) No Sunday slots, 3) Admin Linea Trebinje PIN 2803, 4) Admin Stefan PIN 1234, 5) Admin Nevena PIN 1234, 6) Training comment feature works, 7) Horizontal date strip with 10 working days. Stefan's PIN was missing in DB and was manually fixed.
